zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Honywood於1561年12月2日出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Sir Robert Honywood Esq36歲，母親Mary Atwater35歲。她於1580年1月6日與George Woodward在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 海倫 比曉普斯蓋特結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和15個女兒的父母。她去世於1631年8月3日在英國肯特加林享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特加林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Honywood于1561年12月2日出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Sir Robert Honywood Esq36岁，母亲Mary Atwater35岁。她于1580年1月6日与George Woodward在英国英格兰倫敦聖 海倫 比曉普斯蓋特结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和15个女儿的父母。她去世于1631年8月3日在英国肯特加林享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特加林。

nameMeanings.name: Honywood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Honeywood in Postling (Kent), which was named in Old English with hunig ‘honey’ + wudu ‘wood’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Honywood was born on 2 December 1561, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Honywood Esq, was 36 and her mother, Mary Atwater, was 35. She married George Woodward on 6 January 1580, in St Helen Bishopsgate, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 15 daughters. She died on 3 August 1631, in Charing, Kent, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Charing, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Honywood est née le 2 décembre 1561, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Honywood Esq, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mary Atwater, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé George Woodward le 6 janvier 1580, à St Helen Bishopsgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 15 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 août 1631, à Charing, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Charing, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lei sposato George Woodward il 6 gennaio 1580, nel St Helen Bishopsgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 15 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Honywoodが1561年12月2日にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Honywood Esqは36歳，母Mary Atwaterは35歳であった。1580年1月6日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト ヘレン ビショプスガトでGeorge Woodwardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と15人の娘の親であった。彼女は1631年8月3日にイギリスケントチャーイングで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントチャーイングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Honywood(이)가 1561년 12월 2일 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Honywood Esq(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Atwater(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1580년 1월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 헬 비숍스가트에서 George Woodward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1631년 8월 3일 영국 켄트 처잉에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 처잉에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Honywood nasceu em 2 de dezembro de 1561, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Honywood Esq, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mary Atwater, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com George Woodward em 6 de janeiro de 1580, em St Helen Bishopsgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 15 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1631, em Charing, Kent, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Charing, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Honywood родилась 2 декабря 1561 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Honywood Esq было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Atwater, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Woodward 6 января 1580 г. в местности ст хелен бишопсгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 15 дочерей. Она умерла 3 августа 1631 г. в местности чаринг, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности чаринг, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Honywood nació el 2 de diciembre de 1561, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Honywood Esq, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mary Atwater, tenía 35 años. Se casó con George Woodward el 6 de enero de 1580, en St Helen Bishopsgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 15 hijas. Murió el 3 de agosto de 1631, en Charing, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Charing, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
